scripts.deploy: npm run cf:build && npx wrangler deploy && npm run kv:flush
scripts.kv:flush: npx wrangler kv key list --namespace-id dda38413b0be42e6b7bcb3ff8308439e | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const keys=JSON.parse(d).map(k=>k.name);if(!keys.length){console.log('KV empty');process.exit(0);}require('fs').writeFileSync('/tmp/kv-keys.json',JSON.stringify(keys));console.log(keys.length+' keys')})" && if [ -f /tmp/kv-keys.json ]; then npx wrangler kv bulk delete /tmp/kv-keys.json --namespace-id dda38413b0be42e6b7bcb3ff8308439e --force; fi
scripts.preview: npm run cf:build && npx wrangler dev
